Scenario: Verify user can register with a valid email
Steps:
1. Go to Register page
2. Enter valid @tzunami.com email
3. Enter password (8+ chars)
4. Confirm password
5. Click Register
ExpectedResult: Account created — user redirected to session start

Scenario: Verify registration blocked for email not in admin directory
Steps: 1. Try to register with an email not added by admin
ExpectedResult: Error: email not in directory — contact administrator

Scenario: Verify registration blocked for non-company email
Steps: 1. Try to register with gmail.com or other domain

1. Enter password shorter than 8 characters
2. Submit

1. Enter different values in password and confirm password fields
2. Submit

Scenario: Verify already registered email cannot register again
Steps: 1. Attempt to register with an email that already has a password set
ExpectedResult: Error: already registered — please log in

Scenario: Verify role assigned by admin is applied after registration
Steps:
1. Admin adds user as QA role
2. User registers
3. Check user role
ExpectedResult: User has QA role as assigned — not default

Scenario: Verify verification email is sent after registration (when SMTP configured)
Steps:
1. Register with valid email (SMTP configured)
2. Check inbox
ExpectedResult: Verification email received with clickable link

Scenario: Verify clicking verification link activates account
Steps:
1. Receive verification email
2. Click verify link
ExpectedResult: Account activated — user logged in automatically

Scenario: Verify invalid/expired token shows correct error
Steps: 1. Use an already-used or incorrect verification link
ExpectedResult: Error: link invalid or already used

Scenario: Verify admin can manually verify a user from admin panel
Steps:
1. Log in as Admin
2. Go to Admin > Users
3. Click Verify on unverified user
ExpectedResult: User marked as verified — can now log in

Scenario: Verify new user is redirected to Start Testing after registration
ExpectedResult: User lands on Start Testing page

Scenario: Verify welcome message shown after first registration
ExpectedResult: Welcome message displayed on Start Testing page

Scenario: Verify user can immediately start a session after registration
ExpectedResult: Session starts successfully — test runner loads

Scenario: Verify login works immediately after registration
Steps:
1. Register
2. Log out
3. Log back in with same credentials
